publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation in the upper right corner by the library. One unnumbered blank leaf at the end, referred to as in the library's digitization.

collation.signatures: Quire marks in the upper inner corner of the first folium of each quire, starting with number 16 on .

binding.decoNote: In the original boards lined with striped silk and covered with blind-tooled leather. The title, the shelf mark, and the abbreviation of the British Museum are gold-tooled on the spine.

history.provenance: The manuscript had very probably belonged to a church in the Gondar area, from where it was taken by Tewodros and brought to Madḫāne ʿĀlam. It was then looted by the British Napier expedition in 1868.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

support.material: A leaf of paper, of a brown colour on the recto side , and of a lighter color, almost white color on the verso side .
There seems to be a parchment patch attached (possibly glued) on with a schematic drawing of a celestial hemisphere, .

item.desc: Schematic drawing of a celestial hemisphere glued on the upside down. The scheme is entitled: መንፈቀ፡ ሰማይ፡, and designates the cardinal points as following: ምሥራ, ደቡ, ምዕራ, ሰሜን.

item.q: Presented by the Secretary of State for India Aug 1868

item.desc: A red seal impression of the British Museum directly on the parchment patch with .

msItem.title: Tables for finding the age of the moon.

supportDesc.condition: Stains of water and dirt. On the content is partially damaged through water stains.

item.q: ይቤ፡ መር፡ በርሳ፡ እምጥንተ፡ በአቶሙ፡ ለእስራኤል፡ በ፸ ነፍስ፡ እስከ፡ ፀዓቶሙ፡ ፪፻፡ ፲ወ፭፡ ዓመ፡

item.desc: The number of descendants of Japhet, Shem and Ham. ውሉደ፡ ያፌት፡ ፲ወ፭ ነገድ፡ ወመክፈልቶሙ፡ ኮነ፡ ምድረ፡ ፀጋም፡ ወመንፈቀ፡ ምዕራብ፡ ወውሉደ፡ ሴምኒ፡ ፳ወ፭፡ ነገድ፡ ወመክፈልቶሙ፡ ኮነ፡ ምድረ፡ ጽባሕ፡ ወመንፈቀ፡ አዜብ፡ ወደቂቀ፡ ካምኒ፡ ፴ወወ፪ ነገድ፡ ወመክፈልቶሙ፡ ኮነ፡ ምድረ፡ አዜብ፡ ወመንፈቀ፡ ምዕራብ፤ ወኮኑ፡ ኵሉ፡ ውሉደ፡ ኖኅ፡ ፸ወ፪፡ ወእንበይነ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ተከፍሉ፡ ኀበ፡ ፸ወ፪፡ ልሳናት፡
Short glossary in Amharic and Gǝʿǝz.

q.seg: በጻሕራት፡ በምጽዓድ፡ ብሂል፡ መቃጽው፡ ዘ፡ ምንቸቶች፡ በገዳመ፡ አሐዱስ፡ ዘ፡ ስመ፡ ሀገር፡ ዘውእቱ፡ መጌጾ፡ አቀተውሙ፡ ዘ፡ አስገበራቸው፡ ውስተ፡ መቀረቡ፡ ዘ፡ መቃረብያ፡ ተጠከዩ፡ ዘ፡ ጠፉ፡ ዐስበ፡ ቀፈት፡ ዘ፡ ዓሥራ፡ ሐዶን፡ ይሜኵዩ፡

item.desc: Short texts and scribbles, some of which are written upside down, partially erased.
A red seal impression of the British Museum different from .
A red seal impression of the British Museum same as .

msItem.title: ʾAbušākǝr
msItem.note: Beginnings of some chapters are hardly identifiable, thus might have been left not marked up for the time being. Several chapters are missing, for example, nos. 47, 51, 53, 58, 59.
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ፈጣሪ፡ ሕያው፡ ነባቢ፡ ኦእግዚኦ፡ ርድአነ፡ በረድኤትከ፡ ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ቡሩክ፡ ዘደረሰ፡ እግዚእ፡ ትሩፈ፡ ምግባር፡ ማእምረ፡ መጻሕፍት፡ አቡሻክር፡ ወልደ፡ አቡእልከረም፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ መነኮስ፡ እብንልመሐደብ፡ ዘበትርጓሜሁ፡ ወልደ፡ ግሡጽ፡ ወእመ፡ አኮ፡ ወልደ፡ ምሁር፡ ዘእሙር፡ በሪሺ፡ ዘተሠይመ፡ ዲያቆነ፡ በቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ዘመዐልቃ፡ እንዘ፡ ይነግር፡ በእንተ፡ ሐሳበ፡ ዐለም፡
msItem.note: The text is glossed and annotated throughout in Amharic.

msItem.title: ʾAbušākǝr: Index
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 1: Introduction
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 2: The Islamic lunar calendar
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 3: The Jewish lunar calendar
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 4: Subdivision of the year
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 5: Era of Alexander et alia
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 6: The months of the Romans and the Franks
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 7: Persian chronology and calendar
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 8: The Coptic calendar
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 9: Chronological transformations in general
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 10: Chronological transformations
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 11: Expansion of Islamic lunar years into days
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 12: On the ranking of day and light versus night and darkness
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 13: Creation of Sun and Moon; calendrical data
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 14: Theories about the weekdays at Creation; criticism
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 20: The "Weeks" and Prophesis of Daniel; Revelation to John
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 21: Chronology of Christ
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 22: Chronology of Christ (duplicating Chapter 21)
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 23: Weekdays and Alexandrian years
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 24: Solar epact (t) for the eras of Diocletian, Incarnation, Alexander
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 25: Epact; 19-year cycle
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 26: Epact
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 29: Passover
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 32: Pseudo luni-solar period of 313 years
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 33: Calendar-years
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 34: Transformation of solar to lunar dates and vice versa
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 35: The 2 "Days of the Wise"
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 36: Use of the lunar epact
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 38: Rules of Christian feasts
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 39: On the Birthday of Christ
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 40: The date for the celebration of the Resurrection; ten rules
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 41: The days of Passover and Easter
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 42: Discrepancies of Easter Dates
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 43: Years of Discord and 95-year "cycle"
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 44: On the erroneous "reforms" suggested by Abba Mark ibn-Qanbar
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 45: Different eras, their norms and epoch dates
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 46: Conversion tables for Coptic and Roman/Syrian dates
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 48: Chronological data from Adam to the Hijra
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 52: The Fathers
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 54: On the eras of the Copts, Romans, Franks and Syrians.
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 55: Varia on eras
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 56: Jewish chronology
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 57: The Miracles of Jesus
ʾAbušākǝr: Chapter 50: History of the Alexandrian Patriarchs
msItem.explicit: ፺ወ፯፡ አባ፡ ገብርኤል። ዘሀሎ፡ ይእዜ፡ በዘመነ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ሠርፀ፡ ድንግል፤
msItem.note: According to the explicit the text must have been translated during the reign of ሠርፀ፡ ድንግል፤, that is 1563-1597.

msItem.title: Excerpt on the Seven Wonders in the World
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር ወመስተሣህል፡ ወውእቱ፡ ይረድአነ፡ ንቀድም፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ልዑል፡ በጽሒፈ፡ ነገር፡ ኅፁር፡ ዘተጋብአ፡ እምነ፡ ሐሳበ፡ ፍቁር፡ ወልደ፡ ቈስጠንጢን፡ መንበኻዊ፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶስ፡ ዘመንበኻ፡ ዘበአምጣነ፡ መፍቅዱ፡ ለዘአዕለዎ። ይቤ፡ ፯፡ መንክራት፡ እለ፡ ሀለዋ፡ ውስተ፡ ዓለም፡ ቀዳማዊ፡ መንክር፡ ፈጢለዩስ፡ ሀገረ፡ ሮሜ። ውእቱ፡ ቤት፡ ንኩር፡ ዘተምሕረ፡ በውስቴቱ፡ ፎሎምዮስ።

supportDesc.foliation: One unnumbered blank leaf at the end.

layout.ab: Primary pricks are visible, horizontal pricks are visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.

handNote.desc: The manuscript is written in a fine hand, between 1633 and 1667

item.desc: The note states that the manuscript belongs to the church of Madḫāne ʿĀlam.
Amharic glosses and annotations for in Amharic.
The owner's name Walda Giyorgis is mentioned on .
Impressions of the seal of the British Museum in the lower margins, same as .
Impressions of the seal of the British Museum in the lower margins, same as .

origDate.note: The manuscript mentions emperor Fāsiladas on .

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)
